data.title: Top 20 press releases of 2025 summarized by PR Newswire in New York, detailing major stories that attracted reader interest.
data.description: In a review of the most impactful press releases distributed through PR Newswire in the last year, New York, Jan. 9, 2026 - PR Newswire looks back on the top stories that resonated with audiences in 2025. These releases garnered significant attention, with hundreds of articles, social media shares, and views, highlighting their widespread reach and influence.

data.title: TerraPower & Meta to build 8 Natrium® Advanced Nuclear Plants for US grid, supporting energy demand growth.
data.description: An agreement has been reached to enhance the reliability of the U.S. grid by introducing carbon-free power to meet the rising energy demand. The collaboration between TerraPower, a leading nuclear innovation firm, and Meta will involve the development of a maximum of 8 Natrium reactor 1 units alongside energy storage solutions. This initiative, announced in Bellevue, Washington on January 9, 2026, marks a significant step towards bolstering the energy infrastructure, indicating a keen focus on sustainable and efficient energy production.

data.title: Greater Columbus School Fair on Jan. 24 at Columbus Zoo & Aquarium to showcase local education options for parents.
data.description: Discover the varied educational opportunities for children in Central Ohio at the Greater Columbus K-12 School Fair on Saturday, January 24, 2026. Starting at 11:00 AM at the Columbus Zoo & Aquarium, parents can explore numerous school options for their kids in one convenient location.

data.title: Vistra and Meta sign 20-year PPAs to add 2,600+ MW to grid, supporting nuclear plants in PJM.
data.description: Vistra, a corporation publicly traded under the symbol NYSE: VST, has recently disclosed their arrangement of long-term power purchase agreements (PPAs) spanning a 20-year period. These agreements are designed to bolster Meta's operational capacity while concurrently enhancing the energy production of three nuclear facilities belonging to Vistra within the PJM region. Specifically, these contracts will facilitate the delivery of over 2,600 megawatts of power over the stipulated duration, marking a significant advancement in their energy provision strategy.

data.title: Insulet Corp (NASDAQ: PODD) will report Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on Feb 18, 2026. Hosting conference call at 8 am ET.
data.description: ACTON, Mass.--Insulet Corporation, a leading company in tubeless insulin pump technology under the brand Omnipod®, will release its financial results for Q4 and the full year of 2025 on February 18, 2026, before the market opens. Along with the release, a conference call will be held at 8:00 a.m. (ET) on the same day. The call will be hosted by the management team. Insulet's stock is traded on NASDAQ under the symbol PODD.

data.title: Parents can explore 40+ school options for kids in San Antonio at School Discovery Day on Jan. 24 at The DoSeum.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in San Antonio, a special event will take place for parents seeking information about schools for their children. San Antonio School Discovery Day will be held on January 24th at The DoSeum starting at 9:00 AM. This event will showcase over 40 schools including public, charter, and private institutions, providing a comprehensive overview of available options for parents.

data.title: Florida School Choice Safari in Tampa showcases 30+ education options for parents and kids on Jan. 24 at Tampa Zoo.
data.description: A public event called the Tampa School Choice Safari is scheduled to take place on Saturday, Jan. 24, 2026, starting at 10:00 AM at the Tampa Zoo at Lowry Park. Parents in Tampa will have the opportunity to explore various educational options for their children as more than 30 public and charter schools' representatives will be present under one roof. This event aims to provide parents with comprehensive information about the different schools available for their kids.

data.title: Zcash experiences developer slowdown with lowest activity since 2021, causing ZEC to drop for two months.
data.description: Developer activity for Zcash has decreased significantly to its lowest point since 2021 due to an ongoing governance dispute, resulting in a negative impact on sentiment within the community. This decline comes as ZEC continues to experience a downtrend for the past two months.

data.title: Dreame Technology win Best of CES 2026 for X-Wind Air Conditioner - 1st robotic arm AC system.
data.description: During CES 2026 in Las Vegas, Dreame, a renowned company in high-end consumer electronics and intelligent manufacturing, unveiled its innovative X-Wind Air Conditioner, which caught the world's eye. This device is the first of its kind worldwide, with a dual design that revolutionizes the cooling experience. The event was covered by the Shuzhi Society, and it highlighted Dreame's position as a global leader. The X-Wind Air Conditioner is set to make waves in the industry.

data.title: Phoenix School Fair on Jan. 24 to showcase local education options with 900+ attendees expected.  Family-friendly event with exhibits and activities.
data.description: Over 900 individuals are anticipated to participate in a family-oriented event showcasing school displays and interactive experiences in Phoenix. On January 9, 2026, it was announced that parents in Phoenix will have the opportunity to explore a variety of school options for their children on Saturday, January 24, in a single location.

data.title: ConvoGPT introduces ConvoGPT OS to automate sales ops with AI agents, aiming to reduce human dependency in various tasks.
data.description: In Greenville, South Carolina on January 9, 2026, ConvoGPT revealed the launch of ConvoGPT OS, an advanced AI employee replacement system. This system aims to reduce human reliance in sales, follow-ups, pipeline management, and deal execution. The unveiling of this innovative technology was disclosed by the company on PRNewswire.
